mapper.select: SELECT ssg.*, su.seller_counselor_id, su.seller_counselor_name FROM store_seller_goods ssg LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ssg.seller_id = su.id WHERE ssg.id = #{id}

SELECT ssg.id, ssg.seller_id, ssg.seller_name, ssg.goods_title, ssg.goods_pic_url, ssg.goods_service_amount, ssg.goods_seller_price, ssg.goods_price, ssg.goods_code, ssg.goods_desc, ssg.goods_desc_one, ssg.goods_desc_two, ssg.goods_desc_three, ssg.goods_brand, ssg.goods_expiration_date, ssg.approved_date, ssg.approved_user_id, ssg.approved_status, ssg.remark, ssg.create_by, ssg.create_time, ssg.update_by, ssg.update_time, ssg.currency_type_id, ssg.currency_name, ssg.currency_type, ssg.goods_category, ssg.discount_rate, ssg.putaway_status, ssg.approved_fail_reason, ssg.goods_channel, ssg.review_num,
ssd.id storeSellDetailId, ssd.celebrity_private_id, ssd.goods_id, ssd.goods_code storeSellDetailGoodsCode, ssd.code_start_time, ssd.code_end_time, ssd.code_discount_rate, ssd.goods_property, ssd.sell_count, ssd.reality_service_amount, ssd.promotion_status, ssd.logistics_num, ssd.receive_time, ssd.share_time, ssd.service_end_time, ssd.remark storeSellDetailRemark,
scp.id storeCeleBrityPrivateId, scp.celebrity_id, scp.account, scp.username, scp.email, scp.nick_name, scp.like_tags, scp.address, scp.bank_account, scp.gender, scp.platform_type, scp.followers_num, scp.posts_num, scp.cooperation_time, scp.contract_status, scp.contract_time, scp.contract_amount, scp.service_amount_period, scp.flat_fee_period, scp.celebrity_counselor_id, scp.celebrity_counselor_name, scp.sell_video_url, scp.remark storeCeleBrityPrivateRemark,
su.seller_counselor_name
FROM store_seller_goods ssg JOIN store_sell_detail ssd ON ssg.id = ssd.goods_id left join sys_user su on ssg.seller_id = su.id LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON ssd.celebrity_private_id = scp.id WHERE ssg.id = #{id}

SELECT ssd.*, ssg.seller_name, ssg.goods_title, ssg.goods_url, ssg.goods_pic_url FROM store_seller_goods ssg right JOIN store_sell_detail ssd ON ssg.id = ssd.goods_id WHERE ssg.seller_id = #{sellerCommerceModel.sellerId} and ssd.year = #{sellerCommerceModel.year} and ssd.month = #{sellerCommerceModel.month}
and ssd.settlement_status = #{sellerCommerceModel.settlementStatus}
